post.title: Lojban Language Documentation
post.content:
Here is a copyright-free, unofficial, libre documentation on the Lojban language. Lojban was created in 1987 and is now supported by its speakers.

You can send any suggestions to gleki.is.my.name@gmail.com or add issues at the Lojban source repository.

Lojban and related topics are discussed in the Lojban chats in Discord messenger.

‘Learn Lojban’ course#

This course teaches Lojban from its formal foundations, but in simple terms and with plenty of usage examples.

  • PDF - in a PDF file for download.

Unofficial ‘Complete Lojban Language’ Book, July 2021 Edition#

This book adheres to the original book published in 1997 and:

  • Fixes mistypes
  • Fixes contradictions
  • Adds new content that does not violate previous content

It is available in the following formats:

  • PDF - in a PDF file for download
  • HTML in sections - in HTML files

More info...

la sutysisku - a slick unofficial dictionary#

  • De facto standard definitions of words
  • Experimental definitions and examples

License#

The license for the ‘Complete Lojban Language’ book (a rather permissive one) is specified in the book itself.


This work (Learn Lojban, by Gleki Arxokuna), identified by Gleki Arxokuna, is free of known copyright restrictions.
